package.name: robot_skill_mcp
package.description:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that bridges agents (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, custom MCP clients) to the Robot Skills Framework over ROS 2 DDS. Runs on the agent's machine as a stdio subprocess; its internal mcp_ros_bridge node joins the lab DDS graph and translates MCP tool calls into ROS 2 service / action / topic operations.
Lives under agent/ rather than src/ because it runs on the agent host, not the orchestrator. Phase 5 adds a co-located robot_script_server so register_script keeps agent-authored code on the agent's machine.
